properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v8 v3 v10 v5 v6 v5 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A fresh wind is blowing It's the wind of God's Spirit Be still and know His voice Listen and you'll hear it

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A new call is stirring Increasing in power Feel the Spirit releasing His strength by the hour

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We will rise to the call We will stand and obey We are warriors who's weapon Is God's highest praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Bridegroom is coming So rise up, oh, Bride Let His mighty kingdom triumph Let us give our very lives

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Destined for greatness With the passionate faith Moving in His power Clothed in garments of praise

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Strong in the Spirit One holy nation True to the calling of Our great salvation We are destined, destined for greatness

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: To love the unlovable Teach the unteachable Touch the untouchable Reach the unreachable

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: See the unseeable Shake the unshakeable Heal the unhealable Break the unbreakable

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Love the unlovable Teach the unteachable Touch the untouchable Reach the unreachable

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: The Bridegroom is coming Rise up, oh, Bride Let His mighty kingdom triumph Let us give our very lives

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Strong in the Spirit One holy nation True to the calling of Our great salvation (our salvation) We are destined (we are destined) We are destined (we are destined) We are destined (we are destined) Destined for Greatness!
